input.prompt:
I'm building a .NET MAUI app with a data service, two ViewModels
(MainViewModel and DetailViewModel), and two pages (MainPage and DetailPage).
The data service talks to a REST API and should be shared across the app.
Show me how to register everything in MauiProgram.cs with the right
lifetimes and explain why you chose each lifetime.
